docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF PETRA PRODUCE, INC'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER (1) COMPELLING DISCOVERY RESPONSES, (2) COMPELLING PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, (3) DEEMING THE TRUTH OF MATTERS STATED IN THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AS ADMITTED, AND (4) IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS LA MISSION MARKET AND ADIL ELMAKHZOUMI IS GRANTED. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants La Mission Market, A Partnership And Adil Elmakhzoumi, Ind. And Dba La Mission Market Resulting From Breach Of Stipulation For Settlement Or Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kaipo K.B. Young, Esq. of Leader-Picone & Young, LLP, T:510.444.2404ext23, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PETRA PRODUCE, INC.'S Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants La Mission Market, A Partnership And Adil Elmakhzoumi, Ind. And dba La Mission Market Resulting From Breach Of Stipulation For Settlement Or Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

ORDER and JUDGMENT signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-25-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Truth Of Matters Stated In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants La Mission Market And Adil Elmakhzoumi.
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAIP K.B. YOUNG OF BARTLETT, LEADER-PICONE & YOUNG, TEL. NO. 1-510-444-2404 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PETRA PRODUCE, INC's Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Truth Of Matters Stated In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants La Mission Market And Adil Elmakhzoumi is granted. No opposition filed. La Mission Market and/or Adil Elmakhzoumi are ordered to pay sanctions of $750 to moving party. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
